programme.title: World Cup Rivalries
programme.desc: Revisiting some of the most riveting matches played by the rival footballing nations

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Counterfeiters lead Simon a merry dance from London to Switzerland via Paris, and the involvement of a bogus countess only complicates matters further. Roger Moore stars, with Kate O'Mara and Philip Madoc

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: The sheriff captures Much the miller's son and threatens to hang him, and an ageing outlaw kidnap's the tyrant's nephew. Drama, starring Jason Coney

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Spikings finds his life in danger when he investigates the kidnapping of a police informant's son _ and uncovers corruption at the heart of SI-10. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Crooked travel agent Monty Wiseman persuades Arthur to agree to pick up a coffin at Heathrow airport and store it in the lock-up. However when a coroner's autopsy is ordered, Monty stashes it in a disgruntled Terry's bedroom for safekeeping leading to suspicions that there is more to the corpse than meets the eye. Suzi Quatro and Derek Fowlds guest star, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is approached by a woman desperate to prove her imprisoned father is innocent of murder. As he proceeds, the case causes him to become plagued by doubt and believe he sent an innocent man to jail for the murder of his former partner. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the afternoon session on day one from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring matches from the first round. Michael van Gerwen is the reigning champion, having defeated Gerwyn Price 11-9 in last year's final

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A stakeout in a bowling alley escalates into a full-scale alert when an atom bomb is discovered, primed and ready to detonate. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star in an instalment featuring a fleeting early appearance by Pamela Stephenson

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry finds himself chatting to a poetic fellow traveller while on a train from Edinburgh, completely unaware his companion is an assassin

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV Sport archives to take a look back at James Hunt, Barry Sheene and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day one from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring the concluding matches from the first round. The biggest upset of this stage last year was arguably when fifth seed and current world champion Peter Wright was beaten 6-5 by James Wilson. There was also a 6-5 first-round loss for 2018 champion Daryl Gurney at the hands of Luke Woodhouse. However, there were no such problems for top seed Gerwyn Price, who overcame Mickey Mansell 6-3

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry injures his hand helping Des, and Arthur's stand-in sidekick gets him mixed up in a heroin deal. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Mike Reid and George Layton, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Sylvia Kay guests as an agony aunt who receives a letter from a hospital patient - but her reply to the poor chap causes confusion on the ward

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: A doctor is involved in a road accident and Norman is the only witness - but is unsure whether to tell the truth. Comedy, with Christopher Strauli and James Bolam

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A stakeout in a bowling alley escalates into a full-scale alert when an atom bomb is discovered, primed and ready to detonate. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star in an instalment featuring a fleeting early appearance by Pamela Stephenson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A series of damning reports claims police officers are not playing by the book, so Regan poses as an ex-con and heads to a club frequented by two officers suspected of running a protection racket and taking bribes from villains to release them. John Thaw stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur sees an opportunity to cash in when a footballer with a drink and gambling habit goes missing, but selling his story to the paper is not as easy as it seems when there is more than one person interested in his whereabouts. Comedy drama, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team are at Newbury ahead of the Ladbrokes Trophy, plus all the news ahead of the Fighting Fifth Hurdle at Newcastle

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore is joined by Alan Ball and Emlyn Hughes to present action from January 1975, including Arsenal v Liverpool and Stoke City v Manchester City

programme.title: ITV Football Classics
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces action from the memorable Group A match, which came from Wembley Stadium. Bob Wilson presented the coverage, with analysis from John Barnes and Jack Charlton, and commentary by Brian Moore and Kevin Keegan

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A selection of the best World Cup Goals through the years - beginning with Geoff Hurst's hat-trick for England in 1966, right up to the 2018 World Cup in Russia

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the afternoon session on day two from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring matches from the second round. Eventual champion Michael van Gerwen narrowly defeated Adrian Lewis 6-5 at this stage last year. Jacqui Oatley presents, with analysis from Alan Warriner-Little, Chris Mason and Mark Webster, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and Dan Dawson

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: Unforgettable World Cups
programme.desc: Memorable moments from the Rugby World Cup since its inception in 1987. Featuring players who have starred the tournament including Serge Blanco, David Campese, Jonah Lomu and Jonny Wilkinson. Plus, memorable matches such as France v New Zealand in 1999 and Japan v Scotland in 2019.

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era, including Nijinsky, Tiger Roll, Best Mate, Desert Orchid and Shergar

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day two from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring matches from the third round. Eventual champion Michael van Gerwen defeated second seed James Wade 10-6 in a high-quality affair at this stage last year, with both players recording a three-dart average of more than 100. Van Gerwen's Dutch compatriot Raymond van Barnevely also progressed to the quarter-finals, rolling back the years to defeat Glen Durrant 10-3. Jacqui Oatley presents, with analysis from Alan Warriner-Little, Chris Mason and Mark Webster, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and Dan Dawson

programme.title: Manhunter (1986)
programme.desc: A former FBI agent is coaxed out of retirement to track down a serial killer behind the slaughter of entire families. The detective needs an angle on the murderer's psychology and the only way to get this insight is to face his nightmares and consult cannibalistic psychopath Dr Hannibal Lecktor in prison. Michael Mann's thriller, based on Thomas Harris's novel Red Dragon, with William Petersen, Dennis Farina, Tom Noonan, Brian Cox and Joan Allen

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: All the action from the evening session on day three from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring the semi-finals and final of the tournament featuring the top 64 players on the Order of Merit. programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day one from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring the concluding matches from the first round. programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: Unforgettable World Cups

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day two from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring matches from the third round. Eventual champion Michael van Gerwen defeated second seed James Wade 10-6 in a high-quality affair at this stage last year, with both players recording a three-dart average of more than 100. Van Gerwen's Dutch compatriot Raymond van Barnevely also progressed to the quarter-finals, rolling back the years to defeat Glen Durrant 10-3. Jacqui Oatley presents, with analysis from Alan Warriner-Little, Chris Mason and Mark Webster, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and Dan Dawson

programme.title: Manhunter (1986)
programme.desc: A former FBI agent is coaxed out of retirement to track down a serial killer behind the slaughter of entire families. The detective needs an angle on the murderer's psychology and the only way to get this insight is to face his nightmares and consult cannibalistic psychopath Dr Hannibal Lecktor in prison. Michael Mann's thriller, based on Thomas Harris's novel Red Dragon, with William Petersen, Dennis Farina, Tom Noonan, Brian Cox and Joan Allen

programme.desc: Jon Bentley visits a theme park to find out which instant camera is the best value for money now the format has recently seen a resurgence. programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Rob Bell discovers the now-abandoned lines that unlocked the wild coastline of north Devon. He begins by following the dramatic Barnstaple and Ilfracombe Railway, which once built, proved an instant success, eventually carrying the glamorous Atlantic Coast Express service, direct from London Waterloo. He crosses to the Lynton and Barnstaple Railway, which traverses the wild terrain of Exmoor up to the cliff-top village of Lynton. Rob follows the adventurous, narrow-gauge route, discovering the extraordinary tale of the line's construction and the very short section that has been fully restored

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly (1966)
programme.desc: A laconic gunslinger, a ruthless hired killer and a conniving outlaw hunt for a cache of loot during the chaos of the American Civil War. However, each is privy to only part of the information necessary to find it, setting in motion a series of deadly betrayals. The third film in Sergio Leone's Spaghetti Western trilogy, starring Clint Eastwood as the Man with No Name, with Lee Van Cleef and Eli Wallach. Featuring Ennio Morricone's iconic soundtrack

programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice helps a widower sell his 200-year-old cottage so he can pack up and start a new life in Scotland. The property is basically sound, but has an air of bachelor neglect made worse by the owner's pet Labrador, which acts like it owns the place

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball

programme.title: Flame of the Barbary Coast (1945)
programme.desc: A cattle rancher falls for a San Francisco saloon-bar singer, but she proves to be in cahoots with a ruthless card sharp who wins all his money. Not to be outdone, he sets out to hone his card-playing skills for a rematch, unaware the city is poised on the brink of disaster. Romantic drama, starring John Wayne, Ann Dvorak and Joseph Schildkraut

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin

programme.title: Knight and Day (2010)
programme.desc: A woman has a chance encounter with a rogue secret agent, who has been framed as a traitor and is on the run from his own superiors. Realising she has been mistaken for his accomplice and is in danger for knowing too much, the fugitive kidnaps her and drags her on a dangerous journey around the world, as he sets out to clear his name and protect a vitally important invention. Comedy adventure, with Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz and Viola Davis

programme.title: Die Hard 4.0 (2007)
programme.desc: Tough New York cop John McClane is sent to escort a computer hacker to Washington for questioning. During this routine operation he stumbles on a criminal mastermind's plan to launch a technological terrorist attack on the US, and is forced to enlist the hacker's aid in foiling the evil scheme. Action thriller sequel, with Bruce Willis, Timothy Olyphant, Justin Long and Maggie Q

programme.title: Birth of the Dragon (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring martial artist trains under a young Bruce Lee in 1960s San Francisco, and is drawn into a showdown between his mentor and renowned Shaolin master Wong Jack Man. Martial arts biopic, starring Philip Ng, Billy Magnussen and Yu Xia

programme.title: The Counsellor (2013)
programme.desc: A lawyer who earns a living representing drug dealers makes a fateful decision to take an active role in their criminal activities. He quickly finds himself out of his depth in a criminal underworld he barely understands, where his actions bring deadly consequences. Ridley Scott's crime thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Penelope Cruz, Cameron Diaz, Javier Bardem and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck! (1960)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, charting the mission to track down and eliminate the pride of the German fleet, a fearsome battleship devastating British vessels in the North Atlantic, orchestrated by a British naval officer recovering from his wife's death in an air raid. Starring Kenneth More, Dana Wynter, Laurence Naismith and Karel Stepanek

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps (2000)
programme.desc: Bumbling scientist Sherman Klump is engaged to be married and determined to rid himself of his troublesome alter ego Buddy Love for ever. All his problems look set to be solved by his fiancee's latest DNA experiment - but things are about to spiral out of control. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy in multiple roles, along with Janet Jackson and Larry Miller

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Riddick (2013)
programme.desc: A fugitive is left for dead by his treacherous followers on a dangerous world full of lethal predators. He lures bounty hunters to the planet in the hope of killing them and stealing their spacecraft, but finds himself forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters at the top of the food chain. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel and Katee Sackhoff

programme.title: The Visit (2015)
programme.desc: Two children are sent by their parents to spend a week at their grandparents' remote farm. They are confused by the old couple's strange house rules, but as they investigate, they discover something disturbing is going on - and that they may not be returning home alive. Horror, starring Olivia DeJonge and Ed Oxenbould

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Black Nativity (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager is sent from Baltimore to New York to spend Christmas with his aunt and uncle. He cannot cope with living by their strict rules and runs away, having a series of adventures as he strives to find his mother. Musical, starring Jacob Latimore, Forest Whitaker, Angela Bassett and Jennifer Hudson

programme.title: A Christmas Carol (1984)
programme.desc: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is given a Christmas Eve to remember when a quartet of ghosts - his dead business partner and the spirits of Christmases past, present and future - turn up determined to cure him of his money-grubbing ways. Adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic, starring George C Scott, Nigel Davenport, Frank Finlay, Angela Pleasence, David Warner, Edward Woodward and Susannah York

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: A US embassy official based in London goes on the run after being framed for a terrorist bombing, in which several of her colleagues are killed, and discovers a plot to detonate another bomb in Times Square during New Year's Eve celebrations in New York. Thriller, starring Milla Jovovich, Pierce Brosnan and Dylan McDermott

programme.title: Adore (2013)
programme.desc: Two women who have been friends all their lives live in a quiet stretch of the Australian coast. They find unexpected happiness after each has an affair with the other's teenage son, but their unusual relationships are threatened when the outside world intrudes on their isolation. Drama based on Doris Lessing's novel The Grandmothers, with Naomi Watts and Robin Wright

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Salem's determination to get his paws on a means of travelling to outer space sets off a bizarre chain of events which sees Sabrina and himself miniaturised inside a toy spaceship which flies up Libby's nose. Melissa Joan Hart stars

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina and Harvey compete against Libby and her boyfriend for the title of cutest teenage couple, but Susie decides to teach them a lesson about vanity. Meanwhile, Salem's efforts to whip Hilda into shape are thwarted by an evil stairlift

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted tries to apologise to an ex-girlfriend for being unfaithful, while Marshall and Lily make a bet with Barney that could force him to wear a tie with a duck pattern on it. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Jason Segel

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall is outraged at his boss's negotiation techniques with a powerful company and decides to deal with the matter himself, while Ted takes his architecture class on a trip. Comedy, starring Jason Segel and Josh Radnor

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ struggles with having to spend his new social security benefits strictly on boring stuff. Kenneth uncovers a secret that upsets the status quo in Maya and Jimmy's relationship. Ray's run-in with an old love threatens his Quiz Bowl championship chances. Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler star

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Outraged when JJ's girlfriend Izzy declines his invitation to the prom, Dylan and Ray plot to make her jealous. Jimmy, Kenneth and Melanie coach Maya to accept criticism for the good of her company. One of the DiMeos takes a big step into a new life

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam plans to attend the school dance with Dana, and reluctantly agrees to take dancing lessons with Beverly. Meanwhile, Murray is forced to have the 'talk' with Adam, but he admits that he hasn't spoken to Barry about sex yet. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries that sexual tension may develop between him and his long-time friend Emmy. Beverly is caught reading Erica's diary, and vows to trust her daughter instead of snooping in future. However, her new faith is soon taken advantage of. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt deals with a personal loss. Jake must decide whether to take Terry or Charles to an exclusive event

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy is back - and this time things between him and Jake are personal. Amy and Charles try to find the perfect new vending machine for the Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD enjoys his last week as a resident before finally becoming a fully qualified doctor, while quirky new staff member Dr Molly Clock (Heather Graham) makes a big impression on the wards. Comedy, with Zach Braff

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD and Elliot both apply for the chief resident position, so Molly steps in to keep the peace between them. Meanwhile, Turk, Dr Cox and the Janitor join forces to avert a crisis. Comedy, starring Heather Graham, Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel needs to prove that all of her employees are American citizens, but runs into problems because of Joe's divorce hearing. Meanwhile, Lennox decides to go to a school dance with one of her female friends. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is pleased when Lennox begins dating the mayor's son, believing he will be a good influence on her. Meanwhile, Ryder spends time with an elderly lady when he takes part in his school's community service programme. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Maggie and Mel use a spell to try to locate a missing Macy, while Harry tries a different approach with Abigael - helping him access his subconscious, so he can connect with his dark side. Fantasy drama, starring Melonie Diaz, Sarah Jeffery, Madeleine Mantock and Rupert Evans

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: A look back at a classic episode of the soap from 2007. Calvin worries about his brother Sonny when he becomes involved with Warren. John Paul and Craig share a drunken first kiss. Meanwhile, Max has severed all ties with Clare, and Becca has a new cellmate

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: This seventh series reaches the halfway stage and, with the possible exception of Phil Wang, all five competitors still have high hopes of winning Greg Davies's massive gold-plated noggin. Under the watchful eye of the Taskmaster's personal bootlick Alex Horne, Kerry Godliman and Jessica Knappett resort to soapy violence, while James Acaster callously ruptures a ukulele

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A visitor from Latvia causes Boyle and Peralta to begin investigating Nikolaj's family. Captain Holt and Santiago bring in famed forensic scientist Dr Yee to help close a difficult murder case for Diaz

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny continue testing their rekindled relationship using an innovative system to report discrepancies. Howard and Bernadette begin to worry when Raj starts treating his new phone like a person, while Sheldon and Amy try to achieve internet fame by creating a video podcast about flags

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Tiger King: Murder, Mayhem and Madness, the Address by Her Majesty the Queen about the coronavirus, Keeping up with the Kardashians and news coverage of Prime Minister Boris Johnson's hospitalisation

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: This seventh series reaches the halfway stage and, with the possible exception of Phil Wang, all five competitors still have high hopes of winning Greg Davies's massive gold-plated noggin. Under the watchful eye of the Taskmaster's personal bootlick Alex Horne, Kerry Godliman and Jessica Knappett resort to soapy violence, while James Acaster callously ruptures a ukulele

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Having been rescued from Hell by Angel, Billy causes chaos with an ability to force men into acting violently toward women - and soon the bodies of battered wives are appearing all over Los Angeles. Cordelia struggles to come to terms with her guilt over freeing the villain, and the team soon discovers Wesley has been affected by the disorder. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted tries to apologise to an ex-girlfriend for being unfaithful, while Marshall and Lily make a bet with Barney that could force him to wear a tie with a duck pattern on it. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Jason Segel

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall is outraged at his boss's negotiation techniques with a powerful company and decides to deal with the matter himself, while Ted takes his architecture class on a trip. Comedy, starring Jason Segel and Josh Radnor

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couple's two children are struggling to save the business from their parents' disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost offers advice to Dan and Miranda Andersen, who are constantly on guard for their family's safety as their children were diagnosed with life-threatening food allergies

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Bobby plans a nautical-themed wedding day, but his fiancee Jas dreams of an intimate local wedding

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Body-confident Ben's plans for a hot-tub wedding may prove to be too much for bride-to-be Hayley, who has always dreamed of a traditional Jewish wedding

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: The gang heads off for a holiday in Cornwall, where a battle for Liv's attention is brewing between Will and Tristan. Mark-Francis gives Freddie advice about securing a date

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the grand final of this year's contest. The last three bakers face three tests of a range of baking skills - a deceptively simple Signature round combining set custard and puff pastry, a Technical celebrating the classic combination of chocolate and nuts, and a magnificent dessert tower for their final Showstopper, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood select this year's winner

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz work and rework a crime scene in their efforts to solve a difficult murder case that is clouded by confusing evidence. However, their sympathy for the mourning mother of the victim leads them to make unrealistic promises to her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard inadvertently gives the impression he is attracted to Amy when he accompanies her to a colleague's wedding. Meanwhile, Howard tries to persuade Bernadette they should live with his mother after getting married and suggests a trial run of the arrangement over the weekend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj feels upset about not being in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find a date and introduces him to a girl he can actually talk to. They hit it off, but when it becomes apparent he has been buying her expensive gifts, his friends suspect she is only interested in his wealth

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends' help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jay's stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Comedy sequel, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring take on a number of ludicrous challenges, hoping to walk away with their reputations intact. Mawaan is not at all fazed when faced with a task involving office chairs, chickens and remote control cars, although the same cannot be said of his rivals. Daisy tries to decipher mysterious messages from Richard, and Katherine is baffled by a giant marble

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: In this episode, 34-year-old Lisa from Waterford is looking for a man to make her heart fly. She meets Jamie, 30, a farmer from a small sleepy village

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Sam aims for a celebration inspired by pixies, although his fiancee Luanne dreams of a traditional wedding like the one her parents had

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Big kid Phil wants a wedding that will go down in history. But his Liverpudlian bride-to-be Elle has her heart set on a classy day at the iconic Liver Building

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Greg tries to sabotage CB so that Weasel can get more credit. Principal Glascott tries to turn his predecessor's parking space into a community garden

programme.title: Schooled

programme.title: Celebrity Storage Hunters

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank meet a couple who have been collecting unusual items since the 1960s, and Danielle brings a rare scooter into the garage

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys find a flying saucer, while Frank makes a gamble on a vintage set of wheels

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: Pressure mounts for the force to replace an ageing 4x4 vehicle, and a vehicle maintenance worker opens the workshop for the last time in his 42-year career

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond, Jeremy Clarkson and James May try to find the perfect car for 17-year-olds, dealing with insurance companies, accident repairs and a muddy music festival car park in the process. Richard also visits Abu Dhabi to test the Lamborghini Murcielago SV and stages a race between the 1000hp Bugatti Veyron and the McLaren F1. Actor, writer and comedian Stephen Fry is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with the offbeat tourism show and is joined in the first edition by comedian and Not Going Out star Lee Mack for a short break in the Belgian capital. Their two-day trip features culture, comics, pralines, puppets and attractions both large and small, including the Grand Place and the famous atom-shaped Atomium, as well as waffles, mussels - including Moules Ghenghis Khan - and the secrets of chocolate-making

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Cold Feet star Fay Ripley for a wintry mini-break in Norway's capital, where they first head to the Thief hotel - home to an art collection including works by Warhol, Hirst, and Koons, as well as a Bryan Ferry-themed dining room. They also take a ride on the city's most popular toboggan run and try to master cross-country skiing, before visiting the National Gallery to check out Edvard Munch's masterpiece The Scream, and sampling Michelin-starred food at Kontrast

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef continues to explore his favourite locations in the Mediterranean, visiting a lagoon in Sardinia where he watches fishermen catching mullet using ancient Roman methods. He also boards a ferry heading for the city of Palermo in Sicily and discovers one of the most impressive pasta dishes of his career

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond and James May test the Porsche Panamera against the Royal Mail's delivery service, racing a first-class letter to see which travels faster over the full length of the British Isles. Jeremy Clarkson gets chased by the British Army in some of their most deadly toys, and multi Olympic gold medal-winning sprinter Usain Bolt is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May each buy a rear-wheel-drive coupe for £1,500 and find themselves entered into a French ice race. Richard discovers a way to fill the waiting time for flights by inventing the sport of airport-vehicle racing, Jeremy gets behind the wheel of the BMW Z4, and actress Sienna Miller is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and Robert Webb explore the Portuguese island, including sampling the scary-looking black scabbard fish with banana at a remote seafront restaurant that can be reached only by sea or cable car. They also head to Funchal for an embroidery lesson and muse over the merits of a Madeiran mini-break while enjoying afternoon tea on the terrace

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Shazia Mirza for a two-day break in the French Riviera, hiring a three-wheeled car for a scenic tour of Nice as well as checking out Cap Ferrat, blue art, fancy yachts and a grotto in Monaco. Later, they take a pricey helicopter ride before they end with a trip to the casino - hoping to win back the budget overspend on the helicopter

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Comedians Ellie Taylor and Josh Widdicombe, actor and writer Steve Pemberton and presenter Fern Britton take part in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Toby organises a sponsored parachute jump to raise money for a children's ward in his hospital, so Lee, Lucy, Anna and the grandparents all agree to take part to support him. But once airborne, will everyone pluck up the courage to jump?

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy are strong-armed into organising a Christmas variety show to raise money for their children's school. However, things prove to be far from plain sailing, as quality acts are worryingly thin on the ground and an animal impersonator as the only confirmed performer. Who can the duo turn to - surely not Toby and uptight wife Anna? With raw egg-juggling and some knife throwing for good measure, what could possibly go wrong - especially in a live instalment of this award-winning sitcom from 2018? Lee Mack, Sally Bretton, Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden star

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and his sidekicks Tubsey and Hyder travel to the spa town of Bath to sample the waters and cook for comedian and vegan Lou Sanders

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall visits Fort Worth, Texas, where he takes on a monster pancake challenge, a painful rodeo test, and local delicacy calves' testes in the world's largest Honky Tonk venue

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie hits San Antonio to sample the finest Tex-Mex food and a gigantic chicken fried steak - with no chicken. He also tests whether he has the moves for TV show Ninja Warrior

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade heads to the Canary Islands for a packed mini-break with actress and writer Lena Dunham, the star and creator of American comedy drama Girls. In the north of the island, Richard and Lena visit a guachinche pop-up restaurant, where they have goat stew before exploring the barren lunar-like landscape around the volcanic Mount Teide and spend the evening stargazing. There is also a sculpture tour, including works by Henry Moore and Joan Miro, as well as layered coffee, a spot of golf and a search for whales

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Rhod Gilbert spend 48 hours in Florida's largest city, for a densely packed mini-break including art, art deco slobbing, alligators, yoga, speedboats and dominoes. They also squeeze in an airboat tour of the Florida Everglades and a trip to Little Havana

programme.title: Red Dwarf: The First Three Million Years
programme.desc: A look at the real and invented science that has been such a feature of Red Dwarf. Plus, the main cast talk about just how special Red Dwarf has been to them

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.title: Red Dwarf: The First Three Million Years
programme.desc: A look at the real and invented science that has been such a feature of Red Dwarf. Plus, the main cast talk about just how special Red Dwarf has been to them

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Living Universe
programme.desc: The Artemis lander deploys robots to explore the surface of Minerva B, and discovers a complex structure that could be evidence of life

programme.title: The Living Universe
programme.desc: On Minerva B, Artemis has found water, organic molecules, complex creatures - all the signs of life

programme.title: Royal Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The crime documentary continues, shedding light on rumours that Princess Anastasia, daughter of Tsar Nicholas II, managed to escape death at the hands of the Bolsheviks in 1918

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How German U-boats were used to disrupt the flow of goods from America across the Atlantic Ocean in an attempt to starve Britain into submission

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of German architect Albert Speer, one of the only war criminals to accept his guilt during the Nuremberg trials, although there were doubts about the scale of his remorse

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Forgotten relics from the defence of America's homeland, concealed by the banks of the Mississippi, and a concrete behemoth on the French coast that proved invulnerable to attacks

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his trusty 1913 Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide, Michael Portillo travels east through the Balkans along the most exotic section of the route taken by the Orient Express. His journey begins in Sofia, capital of Bulgaria, and includes stops in the ancient city of Plovdiv, the region of Rumelia, and former capital of the Ottoman Empire Edirne. Arriving in Istanbul, Michael takes a trip on the Bosphorus - a much-coveted stretch of water - finds out about Turkish delight and travels along the Marmaray metro line, which connects European and Asian Istanbul via a tunnel beneath the Bosphorus

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Chenies Manor, near Amersham in Buckinghamshire, where members of the public bring along treasured antiques and collectibles to hear their stories and discover their worth. Items include a chair designed by a family better known for luxury cars, a painting by one of Britain's first modern artists and a helmet brought in by a collector of Star Wars memorabilia. Specialist Freya Yuan also translates a poem engraved on a bamboo pot, and there's a debate on antique ivory with Will Travers of the Born Free Foundation and Marjorie Trusted of the V&A Museum

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: As rugby union's Six Nations Championship kicks off in Cardiff, train manager Jodie Edwards and her team try to get thousands of fans home after the match. Penzance in Cornwall remains shut off from the rest of the network as engineers work around the clock to get services running through Dawlish, where the line was washed away, while new duty manager Joe has his hands full on his first Saturday night shift at London's Paddington station when the last Wales-bound train of the evening has a problem

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Independent, a skyscraper in Austin, Texas. At a height of 690ft, it is the tallest building in the city, surpassing the 683ft Austonian, another residential skyscraper

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The search for Josef Mengele, one of the most wanted Nazi war criminals, which was led by Holocaust survivor Simon Wiesenthal

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Account of Operation Barbarossa, Germany's plan to invade the Soviet Union in 1941, revealing the massive human and financial cost endured by the Soviet people, who fought a bloody and lonely war with little support from the Allies. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Vienna, Michael Portillo encounters a pre-Cold War spy and learns about the concert that caused a riot in 1913. He then travels the Habsburg imperial line across the Semmering Pass, a line blasted through the Alps. In Graz, the former politician ventures underground at the Lurgrotte Caves to find out about a famous rescue operation of the past, then in Slovenia discovers how an earthquake in Ljubljana prompted its citizens to assert their national identity in architecture and art. Arriving in the Italian port of Trieste, Michael savours the imported coffee that fuelled a cafe culture

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Broughton Castle, near Banbury, Oxfordshire. Among the finds brought in to be valued are an art nouveau vase, a Georgian dolls' house, a Victorian baby bouncer, a letter from Lord Nelson, a book of early police mug shots, a collection of talismans and a musical penknife. Plus, Philip Mould meets a tax inspector who was paid in paintings by several artists

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek auctions off some vehicles that were used in the TV show Heartbeat. There's love for an Austin Cambridge and a sporty Italian number finds a new home

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Examining the complex system the Nazis set up to implement the extermination of the Jewish race throughout Europe from 1942, with Auschwitz as the hub. The programme reveals that at other camps, including Treblinka, Belzec and Sobibor, rival commanders participated in the genocide with enthusiasm and shared ideas for the best method of mass murder

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment

programme.desc: The search for Josef Mengele, one of the most wanted Nazi war criminals, which was led by Holocaust survivor Simon Wiesenthal

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: Auction lots are examined to reveal their historical significance, including a large collection of antique taxidermy and a love token from a convict transported overseas

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: Featuring items belonging to the crew of the Titanic and the Great Train Robbery suspects, plus dresses worn by Bjork and a key belonging to Catherine the Great

programme.title: Sounds of the Sixties
programme.desc: A selection of archive footage from the arrival of the so-called beat boom in 1964, which catered to the art-school craze for rhythm and blues. Featuring performances by Tom Jones, the Kinks, Manfred Mann, the Rolling Stones, John Lee Hooker and the Pretty Things

programme.title: Sounds of the Sixties
programme.desc: Folk performances by artists including Pete Seeger, Tim Buckley, Joan Baez, Bob Dylan and Leonard Cohen

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: Studio and concert performances from the decade, featuring Free, Deep Purple, Jethro Tull, Yes and Dr Feelgood

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: A collection of studio and concert performances from the decade, featuring the Carpenters, Wings, Abba and Kate Bush

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues the final leg of his journey, meeting a survivor of the Coventry Blitz and exploring how the city has been rebuilt since the 1940 bombardment. Reaching Aylesbury in Buckinghamshire, he stops overnight at Hartwell House and visits the area's last pure-breed duck farmer, before heading to Watford in Hertfordshire to learn about Operation Pied Piper

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches London, where he continues to discover what remains of George Bradshaw's Britain. Arriving at St Pancras, he learns about the station's troubled history and £800million makeover, before travelling along the world's first underground line from King's Cross to Farringdon. The trip comes to an end at the Houses of Parliament, where he climbs the clock tower and meets the men responsible for keeping Big Ben working

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on another journey around the nation with a copy of George Bradshaw's Victorian Railway Guidebook to discover how the railways have affected people and find out what remains of Bradshaw's Britain. He begins by exploring Brighton's Victorian aquarium, the underground quarries of Godstone, Surrey, and the wonders of the Crystal Palace in suburban south-east London

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the next leg of his journey, learning about the London Necropolis Railway, a funeral service that transported coffins from Waterloo to Surrey's Brookwood Cemetery from 1854 to 1941. He also discovers how London's West End became a popular shopping destination in the 19th century and examines the changing fortunes of the city's docks

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The third leg of Michael Portillo's journey from Brighton to Cromer begins in the London borough of Enfield, where he visits the Royal Small Arms Factory, the largest machine shop in Europe in the Victorian era. He then discovers the influence of trains on horse racing in Newmarket, and heads to Cambridge to find out why it could be considered the birthplace of football

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo goes fishing at Ely in Cambridgeshire with the last remaining eel trapper on the Fens, and visits the Denver Sluice, one of the great triumphs of 19th-century engineering. In the Norfolk town of King's Lynn, he uncovers an ambitious plan to reclaim the Wash in Victorian times

programme.title: Wild North
programme.desc: Documentary examining three landscapes in northern Scandinavia. In the mountainous highlands, cameras capture two endangered predators relying on a plentiful supply of lemmings

programme.title: Wild North

They would ideally like a property with three bedrooms for when their family come to visit. Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: Kirstie's Christmas: Quick & Easy Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp creates quick and easy crafts for the festive season. She is joined by Phil Spencer, who gets the party started with some cocktail magic. Kirstie's sister, florist Sofie, helps with some festive florals that can be scaled up or down for any size of gathering. And in the kitchen, baker Nancy Birtwhistle has a raft of recipes, tips and tricks for all things foodie and festive

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Look backing at some of the most memorable stories filmed at King's College Hospital, including a young woman who had been knocked unconscious in an attack on her way home. Elsewhere, 91-year-old Rose is rushed to King's with a suspected stroke, and reminisces about the strength and resilience of her own grandmother, and a junior doctor talks about his background growing up in Liverpool

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Revisiting a series of previous dates where sparks flew on their first meeting, including 21-year-old dancer Frankie who was set up on a date with fellow dancer Muhala, and the pair were thrilled to be matched with someone who shared similar passions. Elsewhere, the programmes looks back at part-time nanny and part-time weightlifter Lucy's date with Caroline, which resulted in a shirt being ripped in front of the packed restaurant

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of programmes including The Crown, We Are the Champions, Strictly Come Dancing, The Undoing, The Great British Bake Off, The Toe Bro and news reports on the Covid vaccine and possible restrictions on family gatherings at Christmas

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes under review include James May: Oh Cook, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, Naked Attraction, and news coverage of Dominic Cummings and Donald Trump

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the grand final of this year's contest. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice

programme.title: World Chase Tag - USA

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, her choice fails to impress hair salon owner Rebecca, computer network engineer Adam, sales adviser Philomena and business owner Charlie

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Computer engineer Adam Bolam-Peel hosts the second party in Keighley, West Yorkshire, and plans plenty of surprises - including Northumbrian pipe playing and a poetry session. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Image-conscious salon owner Rebecca Saunders knows she is not a great cook, and hopes her entertainment will make up for that as she hosts the competition in Keighley, West Yorkshire. She gives mock makeovers to the guests, and they are all surprised by Adam's transformation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sales adviser Philomena Golenya hosts the penultimate dinner party in Keighley, West Yorkshire, and tries to impress her guests by writing her four-course menu in Italian. However, a broken chair and a small fire in the kitchen threaten to derail proceedings, until her Italian dancing proves to be a hit with one of the guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business owner Charlie Walker hosts the final dinner party in Keighley, West Yorkshire, and hopes to impress his guests with a 'stylish with swimwear' dress code and hot-tub disco, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teaching assistant Sunita hosts the first of five parties in the West Midlands, hoping an an authentic Punjabi feast will impress guests Liz, Digby, George and Tutsi

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack is nominated for an award and Grace is racked with feelings of guilt while attending the funeral of a schoolmate she used to tease for having a lisp. American sitcom, starring Sean Hayes and Debra Messing

programme.desc: Jack receives unwanted attention from besotted fan Val, while Will and Grace keep their unsuitable dates a secret from each other. Woody Harrelson guest stars

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul uncovers a cannabis farm during a routine arrears inspection, but learns that the tenant has been in prison for the past four months and claims ignorance of the criminal crop. Meanwhile, builders Stuart and Steve win a possession order to regain their property, but face the worst damage they have ever seen and a £20,000 bill to repair it

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After taking pity on a single mother, landlord Ronnie discovered mystery occupants have turned his property into a scrap metal merchants. Brent Council housing enforcement officer Herb discovers 26 labourers living in life-threatening conditions in a single house, while letting agent John tries to find a solution for a tenant living in squalor due to an issue with hoarding

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team closes in on a suspected petrol thief, stops a motorist with a stash of suspicious goods in his boot, and tracks a motorist who heads to the fair after ditching his car. The police also have an appointment with a drink-driver who crashed into a doctor's surgery, and the owner of an uninsured car tests the officers' patience to the limit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drink-driver is involved in a crash, a van full of criminals loses control in a high-speed pursuit, and the police helicopter is involved in a lengthy manhunt. Officers also deal with trouble on the streets of Derbyshire, and pursue a motorist who thinks he can outrun the law

programme.desc: Charlie and Alan hope to cheer up a depressed Evelyn by inviting Russell the pharmacist to her birthday party. However, when he shows up with a hot date in tow, the Harper matriarch ends up even more upset

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The buy-to-let documentary series looks back at cases from earlier episodes to find out if matters were resolved or have only got worse. But just as the eviction was going through, she threatened to call the police

Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.desc: Baltimore detectives Munch and Falsone head for pastures new, travelling to New York to aid the investigation into the death of a teenage model, while McCoy has a fight on his hands with the attorney representing the victim's parents. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

Meanwhile, DiNozzo's father comes to the aid of a homeless woman, who makes a surprising claim about his relationship with her. Guest starring Robert Wagner

programme.desc: Tony finds himself in a difficult position when his identity is stolen. Naval crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy manages to foil a home invasion, but when Gibbs is called in to investigate, he suspects the teenager may be withholding crucial information. As the case makes progress, Gibbs turns his attention to helping the boy's mother, the wife of a naval officer, and his efforts result in an invitation to the White House to meet the First Lady (Michelle Obama, guest starring as herself). Meanwhile, Director Vance and FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing case involving the escaped British spies

Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, George Hamilton and Lesley Warren

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Columbo: Candidate for Crime (1973)
programme.desc: An ambitious senatorial candidate murders his campaign manager for threatening to expose his secret affair. To avoid suspicion, the politician makes the killing look as if he was the intended target of an assassination attempt that went wrong - but ends up having to pit his wits against the slovenly sleuth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An Alzheimer's patient claims to have been raped. Fin receives his sergeant orders. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami

programme.desc: Jay Blades visits the recycling centre in Altrincham in search of three pieces of skip-bound trash that he can rework and repurpose. programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.desc: A dripping tap keeps Zigby awake all night
